/** * Return flexbox spec versions by prefix */ module.exports = function (prefix) { let spec if (prefix === '-webkit- 2009' || prefix === '-moz-') { spec = 2009 } else if (prefix === '-ms-') { spec = 2012 } else if (prefix === '-webkit-') { spec = 'final' } if (prefix === '-webkit- 2009') { prefix = '-webkit-' } return [spec, prefix] }
